---
title: "NeurIPS 2019: Registration Like Airport Security"
description: "7,500 attendees and counting at NeurIPS 2019."
author: "synesis"
date: "2019-12-08"
categories: [conference, photo]
image: cover.jpg
---

![NeurIPS 2019 registration line.](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

NeurIPS 2019 registration line on Sunday looks like airport security line. 7500 attendees and counting!


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_neurips2019-activity-6609485312093757441-ri-o).*
